# PHIL.175 ? Redundancy Over Efficiency

**Type:** PHILOSOPHY
**Category:** risk_management
**Subcategory:** redundancy_over_efficiency
**Domain:** RISK_MANAGEMENT
**Status:** active

## Core Principles
Accept some inefficiency for resilience and reliability

## Application
Build backup systems, maintain spare capacity, avoid single points of failure

philosophy, risk-management, redundancy-over-efficiency
